chat.title: Xiaohong AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Joinus Cultural Travel Guide
chat.welcomeFull:
🙏 Hello! I'm Xiaohong, your wise pilgrimage travel assistant.

I'm well-versed in 12 major faiths, 60 holy sites, and 27 ancestral temples around the world. Whether you want to learn about pilgrimage routes, spiritual practices, or religious culture, feel free to ask.

How can I help you today?
chat.fallbackReply: Sorry, I'm unable to answer this question at the moment.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About Us
about.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vision.summary: Helping {highlight} explore the world's cultural heritage sites, building a global network of cultural travel peace ambassadors.
about.vision.detail: Joinus is dedicated to being a bridge connecting the world's great religious cultures. We believe that by personally visiting the birthplaces and holy sites of various faiths, people can gain a deeper understanding of different cultural traditions, promoting dialogue and peace between civilizations.
about.values.title: Core Values
about.values.dialogue.title: Interfaith Dialogue
about.values.dialogue.desc: Covering twelve major faiths including Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, and Islam, respecting every faith tradition and promoting understanding and exchange between different religions.
about.values.peace.title: Cultural Peace
about.values.peace.desc: Using travel as a bond and culture as a bridge, promoting global religious cultural peace and building a spiritual homeland for a shared human destiny.
about.values.digital.title: Digital Heritage
about.values.digital.desc: Leveraging modern technology to digitally preserve and share precious religious cultural heritage, enabling more people to learn and understand.
about.values.immersive.title: Immersive Experience
about.values.immersive.desc: Combining AI assistants, interactive maps, and pilgrimage journals to provide users with deeply immersive religious cultural travel experiences.
about.team.title: Our Team
about.team.desc: Our team is composed of passionate partners in religious cultural research, travel services, and technological innovation. Team members come from diverse cultural backgrounds with rich experience in religious studies, the tourism industry, and internet technology. We are dedicated to combining professional expertise with modern technology to create the finest pilgrimage travel experience for our users.
